channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Montreal Canadiens secure 4-3 shootout win over Florida Panthers after late comeback
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens managed a hard-fought 4-3 victory over the Florida Panthers in a game that extended into overtime and ultimately a shootout. With the playoffs already secured, Montreal faced ch...

item.title: Experts Warn About Fast Global Deforestation and Its Impact on Nigeria

item.title: Trump Announces Iran Ceasefire Amid Tensions Over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: In the latest update, US President Donald Trump has brokered a ceasefire agreement with Iran, following high-stakes talks. The ceasefire is set to last for two weeks, with Iran agreeing to reopen the ...

item.title: What to Do if You Sent Money to the Wrong GCash Number
item.description: Sending money to the wrong GCash number can be a stressful experience, but there are steps you can take to recover the funds. If you've mistakenly sent money to the wrong recipient via GCash, there ar...

item.title: Global energy crisis boosts Tesla EV sales despite previous setbacks

item.title: Brisbane Rideshare Driver Charged with Sexual Assault and Stalking
item.description: A Brisbane rideshare driver has been arrested and charged with a series of serious offences, including rape, coercive control, and stalking, following reports from three women. The 29-year-old man, fr...

item.title: Rising Fuel Prices Force Nearly Half of Luzon Fishers to Pause Operations
item.description: Nearly 50% of small-scale fishers in certain Luzon provinces such as Cavite, Bataan, Zambales, and Pangasinan have stopped fishing because of continuous oil price hikes, according to the Samahang Indu...

item.title: Partial Internet Suspension Imposed in Manipur Following Fatal Ethnic Clashes
item.description: In Manipur, northeastern India, a partial internet shutdown has been enforced after fresh violence resulted in the deaths of four individuals, including two children. The unrest erupted following a re...

item.title: Skin Patch from Donor Allows Early Detection of Lung Transplant Rejection

item.title: Stakeholders respond to Gauteng cabinet reshuffle amid political manoeuvres

item.title: US and Iran Agree to Two-Week Ceasefire Following Discussions with Pakistan

item.title: NTA Advises CUET UG 2026 Candidates on Photo Mismatch and Identity Verification Process
